headlines.description: — Michael Porter Jr. tied his season high with 35 points, Nic Claxton had his second triple-double and the Brooklyn Nets beat the New Orleans Pelicans 119-101 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porter, Claxton lead the Nets to a 119-101 victory over the Pelicans

headlines.description: — Jalen Johnson had his second straight triple-double and fourth of the season, finishing with 30 points, 12 rebounds and 12 assists in the Atlanta Hawks' 131-116 victory over the Washington Wizards on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Johnson has 2nd triple-double in 2 nights to lead the Hawks past the Wizards, 131-116

headlines.description: — Pat Spencer scored a career-high 19 points in his first NBA start and the Golden State Warriors shook off an awful-shooting first quarter to defeat the Cleveland Cavaliers 99-94 Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pat Spencer scores career-high 19 in first NBA start as Warriors beat Cavaliers 99-94

headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham had 23 points and 12 assists and the Detroit Pistons beat Milwaukee 124-112 on Saturday night to end the Bucks’ 15-game winning streak in Detroit.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cunningham and Duren lead Pistons to rare victory over Bucks, 124-112

headlines.description: — Zach LaVine had season highs of eight 3-pointers and 42 points, and the Sacramento Kings got their first double-digit win of the season Saturday by topping the Miami Heat 127-111.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zach LaVine scores 42, Kings top Heat 127-111 to snap four-game slide

headlines.description: — Naz Reid made a go-ahead 3-pointer with 13 seconds remaining, Jaden McDaniels scored 27 points and the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the Los Angeles Clippers 109-106 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Reid makes a go-ahead 3-pointer, McDaniels scores 27 and Timberwolves edge Clippers

highlights.headline: Harden passes Carmelo for 10th on scoring list with 34-point game
highlights.description: James Harden surpasses Carmelo Anthony for 10th on the all-time scoring list, dropping 34 in the Clippers' loss to the Timberwolves.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Harden passes Carmelo for 10th on scoring list with 34-point game) 2025/12/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Anthony Davis scored 29 points and the Dallas Mavericks beat the Houston Rockets 122-109 on Saturday night to finish a back-to-back coming off a blowout loss at defending champion Oklahoma City.
headlines.shortLinkText: Anthony Davis bounces back from rough game with 29 points as Mavs beat Rockets 122-109
